properties.description: Identifies when MagicDNS is turned off on the tailnet. Disabling MagicDNS changes DNS behaviour for every device and is occasionally a precursor to wider DNS hijacking - verify the change was intentional.
properties.name: Tailscale: MagicDNS disabled
properties.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where Action == "UPDATE"
| where tostring(Target.type) == "TAILNET"
| where tostring(Target.property) == "MAGICDNS_PREFERENCES"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| extend OldMagicDns = tobool(Old.magicDNS)
| extend NewMagicDns = tobool(New.magicDNS)
| where OldMagicDns == true and NewMagicDns == false
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, OldMagicDns, NewMagicDns, Origin
